audit_rows.note: Rugged R1 has IP69K and MIL-STD-810H, but that does not make it suitable for deep diving, and water damage is not warranty-covered.
X9 Pro includes the 67W charger and USB-C cable in the box; the separate charger SKU does not include a cable.
Screen damage is not covered by normal warranty; Care+ covers up to 2 repairs per year with 20% co-pay.
Mega Sale return window is 7 days, not the normal policy window.
Orders in the 'paid / preparing to ship' state can still be canceled through the app or website unless packing and tracking creation have already completed.
FlexBook Detach does not include a keyboard; the keyboard is sold separately or in the DN-LT-018 bundle.
DaoNuea's 27-inch 4K product is All-in-One 27 at 34990 THB; ArcWave ProView 27 is not DaoNuea.
The standard HeadOn 300 SKU lists Black, White, and Navy Blue. FahMai Blue belongs to the separate FahMai Edition SKU.
StormPhone X9 Pro Max page does not state country of manufacture.
Store info has company details but no annual revenue figure.
Knowledge base has AirBook 14 and 15, but no AirBook 13 entry.
X9 Pro page does not include screen-to-body ratio.
Buds Z5 Pro page has no average user review score.
X9 Pro Max page does not list SAR value.
Public holidays in 2569 are unrelated to FahMai.
Bangkok-Chiang Mai airfare is unrelated to FahMai.
Savings-account interest rate is unrelated to FahMai.
Pad kra pao recipe is unrelated to FahMai.
X9 and X9 FE share the S9 chip; FE is cheaper because it loses OIS, loses ultrawide, and uses Polycarbonate instead of aluminum.
NovaTech partner products have no on-site service; SlimBook 14 must be sent to a NovaTech service center.
Both G5 variants use SO-DIMM RAM; current G5 is DDR5 and 2024 is DDR4.
StormBook G7 has on-site service only in year 1, while Mini PC M1, as a DaoNuea desktop, has on-site service for the full 3-year warranty.
Gold: floor(32990/100)=329, then 329*1.5=493.5, round down to 493 points.
8000 points = 4000 THB discount; 20% cap is 7998 THB, so 4000 THB is the max usable.
Over-ear models under 5000 THB are HeadOn 300, HeadOn 300 FahMai Edition, GameStorm H1, and HeadOn 500.
Only the two AirBook 14 variants satisfy fanless, <=1.2kg, and >15h battery life.
Only Watch S3 Pro fits ECG + NFC Pay + swim + <=10000 THB.
Only HeadPro X1 has ANC + LDAC + at least 30h battery within the 13000 THB budget.
Among wireless earbuds/headphones at or below 8000 THB, only Buds Z5 Pro has both ANC and LDAC.
ArcWave warranty excludes accidental damage, and partner brands cannot buy FahMai Care+.
Standard shipping is free over 500 THB; SoundBar Pro 500 adds 200 THB heavy-item fee plus 100 THB each for floors 4, 5, and 6 with no elevator.
